title: Personal Assistant
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a dedicated and versatile Personal Assistant to provide comprehensive support. The successful candidate will be responsible for a wide range of tasks, blending personal support with administrative duties to ensure the smooth functioning of the executive's professional and personal life.

Key Responsibilities:

• Provide administrative and general office support as required.

• Manage and execute various personal and professional errands, including but not limited to grocery shopping and other ad-hoc tasks.

• Provide safe and timely transportation for a child to and from school and other activities.

• Offer companionship and academic support to the child, assisting with homework and learning activities.

• Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion.

• Perform other duties as assigned by the employer.


Qualifications and Requirements:

• Proven experience in a personal assistant, administrative, or similar role is an advantage.

• Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

• A high degree of professionalism, reliability, and integrity.

• Must possess a valid Class 3/3A Singapore driving license and a clean driving record,

as the role requires regular driving duties.

• Proficiency in English is required for effective communication in a professional setting and to assist with academic support.

• Proficiency in Japanese is required to communicate with Japanese-speaking associates.

• All candidates are welcome to apply.


To Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your suitability for the role to Send：Yvette@dsolution.info CC: yangyi@dsolution.info and info@dsolution.info

GOLDEN LOTUS HERBTECH PTE. LTD. is an equal opportunity employer. We adhere to the Tripartite Guidelines on Fair Employment Practices (TGFEP) and are committed to selecting candidates based on merit, regardless of age, race, gender, religion, marital status, or family responsibilities.

postedCompany.description:
Diversified Solutions Private Limited is a leading Employment Agent and Corpset service provider. We specialize in connecting talented individuals with exceptional employment opportunities, catering to diverse industries and job roles. With our extensive network and personalized approach, we strive to match qualified candidates with organizations seeking top talent.

As an Employment Agent, our services encompass HR consulting, talent acquisition, workforce management, and HR compliance, empowering organizations to streamline their operations and enhance overall productivity.

Diversified Solutions Private Limited is committed to delivering excellence, integrity, and professionalism in every aspect of our services. We prioritize building strong partnerships with our clients, understanding their unique requirements, and providing tailored solutions that align with their business objectives.
postedCompany.name: DIVERSIFIED SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
